title: CVE-2026-3714 - OpenCart Incomplete Fix CVE-2024-36694 template.php save special

scripts.content:
#!/bin/bash
# CDB APEX v37.0 — Block threat IPs for: CVE-2026-3714 - OpenCart Incomplete Fix CVE-2024-36694 templ
iptables -A INPUT -s 4.0.2.3 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 4.0.2.3 -j DROP
echo 'Firewall rules applied'
SecRule REQUEST_HEADERS:Host "@rx template\.php" "id:370001,phase:1,deny,status:403,msg:'CDB APEX Block: thr-692ff92ba8c7'"

| CDB APEX v37.0 Threat Hunt Query
index=* ((dest_ip IN ("4.0.2.3")) OR (query IN ("template.php"))) | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip, action | sort -count

#!/bin/bash
# CDB APEX v37.0 — Emergency Hardening Script
# Threat: CVE-2026-3714 - OpenCart Incomplete Fix CVE-2024-36694 templ
# Generated: 2026-03-09T09:10:45.189087+00:00

echo "[*] Updating system packages..."
apt-get update && apt-get upgrade -y 2>/dev/null || yum update -y 2>/dev/null

echo "[*] Enabling firewall..."
ufw enable 2>/dev/null || firewall-cmd --set-default-zone=drop 2>/dev/null

echo "[*] Disabling unnecessary services..."
systemctl disable --now telnet.socket 2>/dev/null
systemctl disable --now rsh.socket 2>/dev/null

echo "[*] Setting secure SSH configuration..."
sed -i 's/#PermitRootLogin yes/PermitRootLogin no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
sed -i 's/#PasswordAuthentication yes/PasswordAuthentication no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
systemctl restart sshd

echo "[+] Hardening complete for threat: thr-692ff92ba8c7"
